audit_items.proof_trace: Port buffers allocated in q6asm_map_memory_regions (line 516) via kzalloc are stored in ac->port[dir].buf but never freed in q6asm_audio_client_release. The release function only frees the main audio_client structure, leaking the port buffer allocations.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker repeatedly allocates audio clients with port buffers and calls q6asm_audio_client_free, causing port buffer memory to accumulate until system memory exhaustion occurs.
